parameters.text:
=🌡️ *DCIM Thermal Alert*

*Status:* {{ $json.overallStatus.toUpperCase() }}
*Message:* {{ $json.message }}

*Thermal Summary:*
• Average Temp: {{ $json.thermal.averageTemp?.toFixed(1) || 'N/A' }}°C
• Max Temp: {{ $json.thermal.maxTemp?.toFixed(1) || 'N/A' }}°C
• Hotspots: {{ $json.thermal.hotspotCount }} ({{ $json.thermal.criticalCount }} critical)
• ASHRAE Compliance: {{ $json.thermal.ashraeCompliance?.toFixed(0) || 'N/A' }}%

*PUE:* {{ $json.pue.current?.toFixed(2) || 'N/A' }} ({{ $json.pue.status }})

*Top Recommendations:*
{{ $json.recommendations.slice(0, 3).map((r, i) => `${i + 1}. ${r}`).join('\n') || 'None' }}

_{{ $json.timestamp }}_
